problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optogenetic. Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
